purpose: Updates tender timing and site inspection details.
notes: Closing moved to 2:00 pm 6 August 2026. Mandatory site inspection moved to 10:00 am Wednesday 15 July 2026. RSVP by 2:00 pm Tuesday 14 July 2026.
caution: Do not republish raw PDF or signature page.

purpose: Invitation, tender rules, evaluation criteria and lodgement structure.
notes: Section A retained by tenderers. Section B deliverables become the tender offer.
caution: Summarise only. Do not publish full tender conditions.

purpose: Technical project brief and design-and-construct scope.
notes: Includes staged design, RPEQ for-construction drawings, as-constructed and Form 16 pathway.
caution: Do not treat summaries as engineering advice.

purpose: Returnable schedules A-L to complete and lodge.
notes: Failure to provide required schedules may make a tender non-conforming.
caution: Do not publish filled forms, signatures, prices or private evidence.

purpose: BOQ workbook for tendered sum structure.
notes: Use for structure only in this workspace. Pricing belongs outside the public site.
caution: Never publish rates, totals or commercial assumptions.
Do not publish full property documentation.

notes: Any signage concept should be RCC-style compliant, accessible, visible and non-hazardous.
caution: Do not reproduce manual content heavily.

purpose: Skatepark audit for Windemere Road Park.
notes: Condition rating 3 - Fair. Priority actions include cracks/wide joints over 5 mm, height irregularities over 3 mm and coping repairs.
usedFor: Repair priorities, site visit questions, concept options.
caution: Do not convert audit notes into final design recommendations without VFG/specialist review.

notes: Photos show water/pooling, debris, graffiti, cracking and existing shelter/fencing context.
usedFor: Drainage questions, site observations and public visual context.
caution: Source PDF stays local; extracted web images are included in this repo by project direction.

purpose: Welded mesh fencing / control fence detail.
notes: Use standard detail as source where fencing is relevant.
caution: Concept only until confirmed against standards and site.

notes: Important for risk review and formal tender/legal review.
caution: Not legal advice. Do not publish full contract conditions.
